sql:
SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(TAIPH.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATE_TIME,
    TAIPH.API_ID,
    TAM.API_NAME,
    TAM.API_URL,
    CASE 
        WHEN TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD = 'O' THEN 'OnDemand' 
        WHEN TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD = 'F' THEN 'SFTP'
        ELSE 'Batch' 
    END AS EXEC_MODE_CD,
    COUNT(TAIPH.API_ID) AS PROC_COUNT,
    COALESCE(TAARH.SYSTEM_COUNT, 0) AS SYSTEM_COUNT
FROM DATAHUB.TB_API_INTRL_PROC_HIST TAIPH
INNER JOIN DATAHUB.TB_API_MST TAM ON TAIPH.API_ID = TAM.API_ID 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        API_ID, 
        API_URL,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN TAARH.STATUS_CD = 'GRANT' THEN taarh.SYSTEM_ID END) AS SYSTEM_COUNT
    FROM DATAHUB.TB_API_AUTH_REQ_HIST TAARH
    WHERE SYSTEM_ID IS NOT NULL AND STATUS_CD = 'GRANT'
    GROUP BY API_ID, API_URL
) TAARH ON TAARH.API_ID = TAIPH.API_ID
    WHERE 1=1
        AND TAIPH.RESULT_CD = 'F' 
      GROUP BY 
    TO_CHAR(TAIPH.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    TAIPH.API_ID,
    TAM.API_NAME,
    TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD,
    TAM.API_URL,
   	TAARH.SYSTEM_COUNT
            LIMIT 20 OFFSET 0
